data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of capturing close-won/close-lost reasons, which is a critical aspect of the opportunity pipeline. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or API reads that confirm the existence of this functionality. The absence of this critical information indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as there are no concrete details or endpoints that demonstrate this feature is implemented.
gaps: No evidence of close-won/close-lost reason capture functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
